```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parametros
s2    <- sample(c(1, 2, 4, 9, 16), 1)
n     <- sample(c(10, 15, 20, 25), 1)
alpha <- 0.05

gl      <- n - 1
q_lower <- round(qchisq(alpha / 2, gl), 4)
q_upper <- round(qchisq(1 - alpha / 2, gl), 4)

## Respostas: limite inferior do IC para sigma^2
correct <- round((n - 1) * s2 / q_upper, 4)
w1 <- round((n - 1) * s2 / q_lower, 4)
w2 <- round(n * s2 / q_upper, 4)
w3 <- round((n - 1) * s2 / n, 4)
w4 <- round(s2 / q_upper, 4)

all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========
Para $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} N(\mu,\sigma^2)$, o pivo $(n-1)S^2/\sigma^2 \sim \chi^2_{n-1}$. Com $n = `r n`$ e $S^2 = `r s2`$, os quantis relevantes sao $\chi^2_{`r gl`,\,0{,}025} = `r q_lower`$ e $\chi^2_{`r gl`,\,0{,}975} = `r q_upper`$. O IC 95% para $\sigma^2$ e $\left(\frac{(n-1)S^2}{\chi^2_{n-1,\,0{,}975}},\; \frac{(n-1)S^2}{\chi^2_{n-1,\,0{,}025}}\right)$. O limite inferior e:

Answerlist
----------
* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========
O limite inferior e $\frac{(n-1)S^2}{\chi^2_{n-1,\,0{,}975}} = \frac{`r n-1` \times `r s2`}{`r q_upper`} = `r correct`$.

Nota: dividimos pelo quantil SUPERIOR $\chi^2_{0{,}975}$ para obter o limite INFERIOR (inversao caracteristica do IC qui-quadrado). Erros comuns: dividir pelo quantil inferior; usar $n$ em vez de $n-1$; usar $S^2$ sem multiplicar por $(n-1)$.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap5S2Q3_IC_sigma2_chisq
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
